findings: Metaswarm rejects banned/cheap models at launch with a hard error rather than silently downgrading.
Fleet/state metadata includes model_policy=premium plus an explicit premium_model_pool and banned_child_models list for sub-agent enforcement.
Commander prompt allows partial only if a circuit breaker triggers and requires explicit success/partial/failed bundle status.
Operator override forbids local time/cost downgrades and requires logging external platform launch blockers instead of silently scaling down.
Smoke tests assert the premium model pool and banned_child_models contract to catch downgrade regressions.
